No Poverty.reason: No course content or learning outcomes relate to poverty eradication, economic resources for the poor, or social protection systems.

Zero Hunger.reason: The syllabus contains no information pertaining to hunger, food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: There is no evidence in the course description or schedule that addresses health, well-being, disease prevention, or healthcare access.

Quality Education.reason: The course explicitly aims to develop basic French language skills and foster an appreciation for French and Francophone cultures, aligning with Target 4.7 on cultural diversity and global citizenship.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No course content or learning objectives are related to water quality, sanitation, hygiene, or water resource management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The syllabus does not contain any information regarding energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.
